allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix admin team switching in setup tab and add CLAUDE.md

- Added state.allFixtures to track all fixtures regardless of status
- Fixed setup tab visibility: admins now see it when ANY team has active match
- Fixed renderFixtureSetup to correctly find active fixture for viewed team
- Fixed renderFixturePlayerSelectors to show correct team''s players for admins
- Fixed setupPlayerSelectors to use activeMatchView for admins
- Fixed updateTeamSelections to update correct fixture when admin switches teams
- Added helpful message when admin views team without active match
- Added CLAUDE.md documentation for future Claude Code instances

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
